01

The upgrade you deserve

Fill the carafe.
Tap your drink.
That's it.

The Bambino was a great way to learn what truly good espresso tastes like. But making it every morning? That's a whole production.

With the Eletta Explore, you press one button. The machine grinds, brews, and froths completely on its own. No wand to hold. No milk to watch. No technique to nail at 7am.

The Bambino way
  • Grind beans
  • Move grounds to portafilter
  • Tamp
  • Press button to pull shot
  • Fill pitcher with milk
  • Hold steam wand
  • Fail to steam to a professional texture
The Eletta way
  • Fill milk carafe
  • Tap desired drink
  • Press one button
One press. Your drink. Done.
02

Your drinks, your way

Your Starbies order,
made at home.

Every drink you'd normally drive to Starbies for — it's all in here, one tap away.

  • ☀️
    Iced latte with cold foam — the daily. One tap, ice cubes, done. The machine tells you exactly how many to add.
  • 🌸
    Hot latte — silky, consistent milk every single time. No burned mornings.
  • ☕
    Hot cappuccino — one touch. Perfect foam. Every cup identical to the last.
  • 🚗
    "To Go" mode — fills your travel mug in one tap, right-sized so it never tastes watery.
  • 👤
    Your profile, always saved — strength, temperature, milk texture, size. Set once. Yours forever.
"If Starbies can make it, you can make it — at a fraction of the price, without leaving the kitchen."
Tap your drink. The rest is automatic.
03

The star of the show

Cold foam,
actually cold.
In any flavor.

The Eletta Explore has two separate milk carafes — one for hot drinks, one for cold. The cold carafe produces foam that holds its shape and stays genuinely cold, not just "room temperature and melting into the drink."

Flavors? Just add a syrup to the carafe. The machine does the rest.

🍦
Vanilla cold foam
Add vanilla syrup → press button
cold foam
🤎
Brown sugar cold foam
Add brown sugar syrup → press button
cold foam
🍌
Banana cold foam
Add banana syrup → press button
cold foam
🌿
Peppermint cold foam
Add peppermint syrup → press button
cold foam
🍎
Apple cold foam
Add apple syrup → press button
cold foam
✨
Whatever you dream up
Any syrup. Any flavor. Your cold foam.
endless
Silky, layered foam — automatically, every time
04

Less of a chore

Maintenance:
less often,
and over faster.

The machine tells you what it needs, when it needs it. You never have to remember anything.

🧪
Goes much longer between descalings
Included test strips measure your water hardness on day one. The machine calculates exactly when it needs descaling — not on a generic calendar.
📱
On-screen guide walks you through it
The color touchscreen walks you step by step when it's time. No manual, no guessing, no wondering if you did it right.
🔄
Auto-rinses after every drink
The milk system self-rinses automatically. Residue doesn't build up like it does on a steam wand.
🍽️
Dishwasher-safe carafes
Both milk carafes go straight in the dishwasher. Rinse and rack.
🧩
Removable brew group
Slides out, rinses under the tap, slides back in. No tools.
Designed to be effortless — inside and out
A machine worth having on your counter every day
⭐
Oprah's Favorite Things 2024 — "For certain caffeine-aholics, the math might mean it pays for itself within a year."
05

The details

Little things
you'll love.

Beyond the headline features — the small things that make every morning feel a little more considered.

💬
The screen has personality. As it makes your drink it shows what's happening — "I'm preparing the milk." Warm, not clinical.
📱
Intuitive as your phone. 3.5" full-color touchscreen with swipe navigation. No instruction manual needed.
💧
Side-loading water tank. Pulls from the front — no awkward reaching behind, no spills when full.
📐
Fits under the cabinets. Bean hopper recessed inside — not sticking up. Just sits there, sleekly.
📲
Coffee Link app. Wake the machine from your phone before you get out of bed.
🇮🇹
Made in Italy. Beautiful design you'll actually want to see on the counter every day.
06

The math

Save money
on every cup.

Starbies adds up fast. One iced latte with cold foam — $7 to $8 after tip, every single time. The Eletta Explore pays for itself, then keeps paying you back.

"After a few months, it's paid for itself — and you never had to find parking."

Every one of those drinks is made exactly how you like it, whenever you want, without leaving the kitchen.

$7–8
per Starbies iced latte with cold foam
At 1 drink/day~$2,500/yr at Starbies
Cost per home drink~$0.50–0.80
Savings per drink~$6.50
Break even at 1/day~10 months
"After that, every drink is basically free."
